title: Proclamation No. 681, s. 1970
text:
MALACAÑANG RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 681

RESERVING FOR THE MAGALANG AGRICULTURAL COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT PROJECT, A PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PRIVATE DOMAIN OF THE GOVERNMENT SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MAGALANG, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA.

Pursuant to the powers vested in me under the provisions of Section sixty-four, paragraph (e) of the Revised Administrative Code, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby reserve for the Magalang Agricultural Community Development Project, under the administration of the Land Authority, subject to private rights if any there be, and to future survey fixing the boundaries thereof, a parcel of land of the private domain of the Government with an area of approximately 755 hectares and covered by TCT No. 11550 of the Register of Deeds of Pampanga under the name of the National Government situated in the Municipality of Magalang, Province of Pampanga, and more particularly described as follows:

Lot 418 Magalang Cadastre Cad. 95

Beginning at a point marked “1” of Lot 418, Magalang Cadastre, Cad. 95, being S, 76 deg. 57′ E., 5235.88 m. from B.B.M. 20, Magalang, Pampanga, thence

containing an area of SEVEN MILLION FOUR HUNDRED TWENTY FOUR THOUSAND TWO HUNDRED FIVE (7,424,205) Square Meters.

Lot 3818 Arayat Cadastre Cad. 231 Insular Gov’t. (Model Farm)

Beginning at a point marked “1” of lot 3818, Arayat Cadastre, Cad. 231, being S. 66 deg. 43’E., 377.38 m. from M.B.M. 21, Cad. 231, thence

S. 39 deg. 46’W., 439.77 m, to point 2; S. 75 deg. 03’W., 141.89 m. to point 3; N. 7 deg. 44’E., 530.24 m. to point 4; N. 74 deg. 20’E., 176.52 m. to point 5; S. 41 deg. 36’E., 44,13 m. to point 6; S. 41 deg. 59’E., 220.34 m. to point of beginning;

containing an area of ONE HUNDRED THIRTY FIVE THOUSAND FIFTY THREE (135,053) Square Meters.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 15th day of April, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and seventy.

(Sgd.) FERDINAND E. MARCOS

By the President:

(Sgd.) ALEJANDRO MELCHOR Acting Executive Secretary

Source: Malacañang Records Office
